title: The Straw Hats Recover in Secret
description: On pages 17, 18, this part focuses on the straw hats become wanted heroes. News of Crocodile’s defeat spreads, new bounties and political consequences appear, and the crew prepares to leave Alabasta quietly.
scene: This scene belongs to the The Straw Hats Become Wanted Heroes sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Alabasta citizen, Vivi, King Cobra, Tashigi, Luffy.

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta citizen
dialogue.text: The bomb is on a timer!

summary: News of Crocodile’s defeat spreads, new bounties and political consequences appear, and the crew prepares to leave Alabasta quietly.
